title: SLU Research: Turmeric May Reduce Inflammation for Diabetic Patients
summary_en: A compound found in turmeric may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in people with prediabetes and type 2 diabetes. In a recent paper published in Inflammopharmacology, Saint Louis University researchers and colleagues have found that curcumin, the main bioactive compound found in turmeric, could help reduce inflammation and harmful oxidative stress in people with prediabetes and type 2
title_cn: [待翻译] SLU Research: Turmeric May Reduce Inflammation for Diabetic Patients
